channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Houston Astros welcome 1B Christian Walker to team; say negotiations with Bregman stalled
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — The Astros welcomed first baseman Christian Walker to the team Monday, in one of two moves that almost certainly marks the end of Alex Bregman’s time in Houston.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NCAA appealing Pavia injunction as D-I board grants waiver to former JUCO players
item.description: The NCAA on Monday appealed the preliminary injunction granted by a U.S. federal judge giving Diego Pavia another year of eligibility even as the organization’s Division I board of directors granted a waiver allowing athletes in a similar situation as the Vanderbilt quarterback to play in 2025-26.
item.dc:creator: Teresa M. Walker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Masters gets 10 more players from top 50 in the world ranking. Glover narrowly gets in
item.description: Lucas Glover held down the 50th spot in the final world ranking of the year, making him one of 10 players who will be added to the invitation list to play in the Masters. The field has eight more players than it did at this time a year ago.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Former NFL great Michael Vick introduced as Norfolk State’s football coach
item.description: Michael Vick has been introduced as Norfolk State’s football coach, a homecoming for the former NFL star and a splashy, attention-grabbing hire for a program that has struggled in recent years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: On Football: Falcons and Buccaneers flip spots atop the NFC South and playoff races tighten up
item.description: The 49ers, Cowboys and Cardinals are out of the playoff race. The Falcons took control of their hopes with help, and the Colts, Dolphins and Bengals kept slim chances alive. The NFL ’s playoff picture became clearer Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Andrew McCutchen, confident he can be difference maker, returns to Pirates on $5M, 1-year deal
item.description: Andrew McCutchen is sticking around to see if the Pittsburgh Pirates can finish the climb back to contention.
item.dc:creator: Will Graves, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Sean Manaea to re-sign with Mets for $75 million over 3 years, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sean Manaea is set to return to the New York Mets on a $75 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the agreement told The Associated Press. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity Monday because the deal was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rangers' Matt Rempe suspended 8 games for hit on Stars player
item.description: New York Rangers defenseman Matt Rempe was suspended for eight games on Sunday after a hit on a Dallas Stars player on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brock Purdy gets his offensive line new cars for Christmas
item.description: (KRON) -- It's the most wonderful time of the year -- especially if you're a San Francisco 49ers offensive lineman. Quarterback Brock Purdy hooked the big dawgs up with brand-new Toyota cars, a video posted by the 49ers on Thursday showed.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Trevor Baskin: From Division II star to Division I grinder
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — From Division II standout to Division I contributor, Trevor Baskin’s basketball journey has been anything but ordinary. After excelling at Colorado Mesa University, Baskin now competes at the highest level of college basketball with the Colorado Buffaloes.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Utah HC erases two-goal deficit to stun Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Mikhail Sergachev scored with 12 seconds left in overtime, as the Utah Hockey Club stormed back from a 2-0 deficit in the third period to beat the Vanouver Canucks and end a five-game home losing streak, 3-2.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NCAA president says there are 'less than 10' transgender athletes in college sports
item.description: NCAA President Charlie Baker told a Senate panel that there are fewer than 10 transgender athletes he is aware of who currently compete in college sports, pouring cold water on an issue Republicans have said is a nationwide problem and one that is increasingly fraught territory for Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, WGN 9

item.title: Boston's Sports Bar & Restaurant's 'Gather Your Herd' Sweepstakes
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — With the NFL playoffs quickly approaching, Boston’s Pizza is giving six lucky fans a chance to celebrate Denver’s postseason push at the ultimate football watch party. “We’ve got some really nice TVs in our bar,” said Brandon Cramer, Boston’s Pizza general manager.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Aggies lose first game of the season to UCSD, 75-73
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Off to its best start in school history, the Utah State basketball team dropped its first game of the year after ten straight victories, losing at home to UC San Diego Tuesday night, 75-73.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: The Chicago Bears have no fire in the trenches
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — When it comes to what's wrong with the Chicago Bears, some argue it's coaching. Others dare to say it's Caleb Williams. Most toss it up to organizational dysfunction, or some supernatural hex inadvertently brought about by the McCaskeys being the McCaskeys.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Former Dodgers MVP heading to New York Yankees: report
item.description: The New York Yankees agreed to acquire outfielder Cody Bellinger from the Chicago Cubs on Tuesday for right-hander Cody Poteet, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the trade had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Bears offense still sluggish, Vikings win easily and send Chicago to eighth straight loss
item.description: The Chicago Bears lost to the Minnesota Vikings 30-12, marking their eighth consecutive loss and dropping them to 4-10 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
